title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 879-5211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 879-5211 Tribal Member Services Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Grand Ronde, Sheridan, and Willamina SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Turn right onto Grand Ronde Road from Highway 18. Drive one mile, then turn left onto the Tribal Campus. The Social Services department is located in Building B, the Community Center. The Education Division is in Building K. Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL SUPPORT PROGRAM UTILITIES - LIHEAP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE
